name: Horror Starter
tagline: CoD-feel cellar shooter — walk, aim, shoot in a lit brick basement
description: A ready-to-play first-person cellar shooter with Call-of-Duty-style feel: snappy grounded WASD movement with sprint, crouch, slide and jump; mouse-look; a held automatic weapon with ADS, recoil pattern, muzzle flash, shell ejection and reload; and a full closed brick-and-concrete basement (generator hall, side stores, spawn hall, sliding doors) lit by warm flickering bulbs, a key light and real point/spot lighting, with fog, bloom, SSAO and grain. Everything gameplay lives in plain project scripts you can read and change — movement, weapon and lighting are all VortexBehaviour scripts.
